title: 🍖  What food should I try in Cebu?

messages.content: 🍖  What food should I try in Cebu?

Dali!, you're in for a treat. Cebu is a foodie's paradise, and you gotta try our famous lechon - it's the best in the Philippines, Nindot kaayo! You should also try sutukil, it's a must-try, a combination of three dishes: sugba (grilled), tula (stewed), and kilaw (raw). And don't forget to try our puso, or hanging rice, it's a classic Cebuano snack. Maayong biyahe! 

If you're looking for a great place to try these dishes, I suggest checking out Larsian BBQ in Fuente Osmena, it's a popular street food destination.

title: 🐋  Where can I see whale sharks in…

messages.content: 🐋  Where can I see whale sharks in Cebu?

Dali! You're looking to see some whale sharks, di ba? Maayong biyahe! You can find these gentle giants in Oslob, southern Cebu. It's a bit of a drive from Cebu City, around 3-4 hours, but it's definitely worth it. You can swim alongside them, but remember, no touching, okay? They're protected, and we want to keep them safe. Best to go early morning, around 6-7 am, to avoid the crowds. Nindot kaayo, right? 

Want to know more about the briefing you need to attend before swimming with the whale sharks?
